name: Sandcake- Sandkage
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Sift in the flour mixture (flour, potato flour, rice flour) and vanilla extract.
4. Stir gently to combine all ingredients.
5. Pour the batter into a greased baking dish.
6. Bake in a moderate oven for 1 hour, or until golden brown.
7. If baked for only 45 minutes, the cake will be underdone but tastier.
